description_long: This coatrack features a tall, cylindrical vertical post with a dark, muted finish, likely made of metal or wood. Three horizontal arms extend perpendicularly from the main post at staggered heights, each ending in a rounded knob to serve as hooks for hanging coats or accessories. The arms are evenly spaced and symmetrically arranged on one side of the post, providing multiple hanging points. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The base of the post is simple and does not include any additional features such as an umbrella holder. Its sturdy construction and utilitarian style make it suitable for use in urban environments such as building entrances, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A tall, cylindrical coatrack with three horizontal arms ending in rounded hooks, finished in a dark, muted color. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three horizontal arms with rounded hooks clearly visible on the right side of the vertical post.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the coatrack, with the arms and hooks barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the three arms and hooks visible on the left side of the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and minimal visibility of the arms.
